```{r}
                                (1- p_Rmax_P[i,t+1])) * (stock_juv[t+1,4]/
                                S_juv_JP[4,t+1]))) + nu_d[i,4] +
                                res_juv_poutes[i,t+1])
    }
    
    d_moy_vichy[i,t+1] <- d_wild_moy_vichy[i,t+1] + I_juv_moy[t+1,1] * 
                          d_juv_moy_vichy[i,t+1] 	+ I_egg_moy[t+1,1] * 
                          dmoy_egg_V[i,t+1]
    d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1] <- d_wild_moy_alagnon[i,t+1] + I_juv_moy[t+1,2] * 
                            d_juv_moy_alagnon[i,t+1] 
    d_moy_langeac[i,t+1] <- d_wild_moy_langeac[i,t+1] + I_juv_moy[t+1,3] * 
                            d_juv_moy_langeac[i,t+1] + I_egg_moy[t+1,3] * 
                            dmoy_egg_L[i,t+1]
    d_moy_poutes[i,t+1] <- d_wild_moy_poutes[i,t+1] + I_juv_moy[t+1,4] * 
                            d_juv_moy_poutes[i,t+1]
    
    juv_vichy[i,t+1]<-d_moy_vichy[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[1,t+1]
    juv_alagnon[i,t+1]<-d_moy_alagnon[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[2,t+1]
    juv_langeac[i,t+1]<-d_moy_langeac[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[3,t+1]
    juv_poutes[i,t+1]<-d_moy_poutes[i,t+1]*S_juv_JP[4,t+1]
    
    }
   }
}


```

```{r}
#| label: verif
#| echo: false
#| eval: false

var_verif <- list(
  juv_tot_system = juv_tot_system,
  juv_vichy = juv_vichy,
  juv_alagnon = juv_alagnon,
  juv_langeac = juv_langeac,
  juv_poutes = juv_poutes,
  S_vichy = S_vichy,
  S_alagnon = S_alagnon,
  S_langeac = S_langeac,
  S_poutes = S_poutes
)

sapply(var_verif, anyNA)

```

# Sortie résultat

## S_juv2ad

Survie recalculée avec l'influence des débits

```{r}
#| label: s_juv2ad
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 8
#| fig.cap: "S_juv2ad issues des recalculs dans R"
s_juv2ad_q <- t(apply(s_juv2ad, 2, quantile, probs = c(0.025, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.975)))
mean_res_periode2<-mean(s_juv2ad[,7:T]) #période 2 commence après effondrement survie=1991


years <- 7:T
s_juv2ad_df <- data.frame(
  year = 1974 + years,
   q05 = s_juv2ad_q[years, 1],  # 5%
  q25 = s_juv2ad_q[years, 2], # 25%
  q50 = s_juv2ad_q[years, 3],# 50%
  q75 = s_juv2ad_q[years, 4], # 75%
  q95 = s_juv2ad_q[years, 5]   # 95%
)

g<-ggplot(s_juv2ad_df, aes(x = year)) +
  # Whiskers
  geom_segment(aes(xend = year, y = q05, yend = q25), color = "#607D8B", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = year, y = q75, yend = q95), color = "#607D8B", linewidth = 0.4) +
  # Caps
  geom_segment(aes(x = year - 0.15, xend = year + 0.15, y = q05, yend = q05), color = "#607D8B", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = year - 0.15, xend = year + 0.15, y = q95, yend = q95), color = "#607D8B", linewidth = 0.4) +
  # Box
  geom_rect(aes(xmin = year - 0.3, xmax = year + 0.3, ymin = q25, ymax = q75), fill = "#CFD8DC", color = NA) +
  # Médiane
  geom_segment(aes(x = year - 0.3, xend = year + 0.3, y = q50, yend = q50), color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  # Moyenne période 2
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean_res_periode2, color = "#E53935", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +
  # Texte à gauche de l'axe y, à l'extérieur
  annotate("text", 
           x = min(s_juv2ad_df$year),  # plus petit que le min(year) pour être hors plot
           y = mean_res_periode2,
           label = round(mean_res_periode2, 3),
           hjust = 2, color = "#E53935", size = 3) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.015), breaks = seq(0, 0.015, 0.005)) +
 scale_x_continuous(
  breaks = c(1981, 1990, 2000, 2010, 1974 + T),
  expand = expansion(add = c(1, 1))  # ajoute 1 unités à gauche
) +
  labs(x = "Années", y = "s_juv2ad") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + 
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "grey20"),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "grey10"),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 5, r = 5, b = 5, l = 70)  # augmente la marge à gauche pour le texte
  )

print(g)
ggsave(str_c(imgwd,"s_juv2ad_recalculR.png"), plot = g, width = 8, height = 8, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
#| label: s_juv2ad_bugs
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 8
#| fig.cap: "S_juv2ad issues des codas d'Openbugs"

s_juv2ad_bugs=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"s_juv2adCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"s_juv2adCODAindex.txt"),quiet=TRUE)
sum=summary(s_juv2ad_bugs, probs=seq(0,1,0.1))
s_juv2ad_bugs_q<-sum$quantiles
mean_res<-cbind(sum$statistics[,"Mean"])

mean_res_periode2<-mean(s_juv2ad_bugs[,(T-6-30):(T-6)]) #période 2 commence après effondrement survie=1991

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0,(T-6)),xlab="Years",ylim=c(0,0.03),ylab="s_juv2ad")

# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = seq(0,0.03,by=0.005),labels=seq(0,0.03,by=0.005),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "grey55")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
lab1=c(1981,1990,2000,2010,1974+T)
axis(1,at = c(1,10,20,30,(T-6)),
		labels=lab1,
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "grey55")

for(i in 1:(T-6)){
	#whiskers
	#95%
	segments(i-0.15,s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,5],i+0.15,s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,5])
	segments(i,s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,4],i,s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,5])
	#5%
	segments(i-0.15,s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,1],i+0.15,s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,1])
	segments(i,s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,2],i,s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,1])
	#boxplot
	polygon(c(i-0.3,i+0.3,i+0.3,i-0.3),c(s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,2],s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,2],s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,4],s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,4]),col="green")
	#mean
	#segments(i-0.3,mean_res[i,],i+0.3,mean_res[i,])
	#median car il y a des valeurs extrêmes qui tirent la moyenne
	segments(i-0.3,s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,3],i+0.3,s_juv2ad_bugs_q[i,3])
}


#segments(x0=0,y0=mean(mean_res),y1=mean(mean_res),x1=(T-6),col="red")
segments(x0=12,y0=mean_res_periode2,y1=mean_res_periode2,x1=(T-6),col="red")
mtext(round(mean_res_periode2,5),side=4,line=0,at=mean_res_periode2,cex = 0.8,col="red",las=1)

```

## N_Vichy

```{r}
#| label: N_vichy
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| message: false
#| fig.width: 8
#| fig.height: 8
#| fig.cap: "N_vichy issues des recalculs dans R (les 6 premières années proviennent des CODAs d'Openbugs)"
#| 
N_vichy_bugs=read.coda(str_c(datawd,"N_vichyCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"N_vichyCODAindex.txt"),quiet=TRUE)

sum=summary(N_vichy_bugs, probs=seq(0,1,0.1))
N_vichy_q_bugs<-sum$quantiles
mean_res_bugs<-cbind(sum$statistics[,"Mean"])
mean_res_vichy<-mean_res_bugs #pour pouvoir le récupérer quand on calcule les adultes restant sur la zone Vichy-Langeac

#on sort les stats sur la série N_vichy calculée dans R
N_vichy_q_r<-t(apply(N_vichy, 2, quantile, probs = c(0.025, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.975)))
mean_res_r <- as.data.frame(colMeans(N_vichy))

#png(filename=str_c(imgwd,"N_vichy_recalculR.png"),width=800,height=800)
plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0,T),xlab="Years",ylim=c(0,15000),ylab="N_vichy")

# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = seq(0,15000,by=5000),labels=c(0,5000,10000,15000),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "grey55")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
axis(1,at = c(1,6,16,26,36,T),
		labels=c(1975,1980,1990,2000,2010,(1974+T)),
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "grey55")

for(i in 1:6){
	#whiskers
	#95%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_q_bugs[i,5],i+0.15,N_vichy_q_bugs[i,5])
	segments(i,N_vichy_q_bugs[i,4],i,N_vichy_q_bugs[i,5])
	#5%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_q_bugs[i,1],i+0.15,N_vichy_q_bugs[i,1])
	segments(i,N_vichy_q_bugs[i,2],i,N_vichy_q_bugs[i,1])
	#boxplot
	polygon(c(i-0.3,i+0.3,i+0.3,i-0.3),c(N_vichy_q_bugs[i,2],N_vichy_q_bugs[i,2],N_vichy_q_bugs[i,4],N_vichy_q_bugs[i,4]),col="green")
	#mean
	segments(i-0.3,mean_res_bugs[i,],i+0.3,mean_res_bugs[i,])
}

for(i in 7:T){
	#whiskers
	#95%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_q_r[i,5],i+0.15,N_vichy_q_r[i,5])
	segments(i,N_vichy_q_r[i,4],i,N_vichy_q_r[i,5])
	#5%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_q_r[i,1],i+0.15,N_vichy_q_r[i,1])
	segments(i,N_vichy_q_r[i,2],i,N_vichy_q_r[i,1])
	#boxplot
	polygon(c(i-0.3,i+0.3,i+0.3,i-0.3),c(N_vichy_q_r[i,2],N_vichy_q_r[i,2],N_vichy_q_r[i,4],N_vichy_q_r[i,4]),col="green")
	#mean
	segments(i-0.3,mean_res_r[i,],i+0.3,mean_res_r[i,])
}

segments(x0=0,y0=mean(mean_res_bugs[1:6,1]),y1=mean(mean_res_bugs[1:6,1]),x1=6.5,col="red")
mtext(round(mean(mean_res_bugs[1:6,1]),0),side=2,line=0,at=mean(mean_res_bugs[1:6,1]),cex = 0.8,col="red",las=1)
segments(x0=7,y0=mean(mean_res_r[7:T,1]),y1=mean(mean_res_r[7:T,1]),x1=(T+0.5),col="red")
mtext(round(mean(mean_res_r[7:T,1]),0),side=4,line=0,at=mean(mean_res_r[7:T,1]),cex = 0.8,col="red",las=1)
#dev.off()
```

```{r}
#| label: N_vichy_bugs
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| fig.width: 8
#| fig.height: 8
#| fig.cap: "N_vichy issues des codas d'Openbugs"
#| 
sum=summary(N_vichy_bugs, probs=seq(0,1,0.1))
N_vichy_q<-sum$quantiles
mean_res<-cbind(sum$statistics[,"Mean"])
mean_res_vichy<-mean_res #pour pouvoir le récupérer quand on calcule les adultes restant sur la zone Vichy-Langeac

plot(1,1,type="n",axes=FALSE,xlim=c(0,T),xlab="Years",ylim=c(0,15000),ylab="N_vichy")

# trace l'axe des ordonnées
axis(2,at = seq(0,15000,by=5000),labels=c(0,5000,10000,15000),cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "grey55")
# trace l'axe des abscisses
axis(1,at = c(1,6,16,26,36,T),
		labels=c(1975,1980,1990,2000,2010,(1974+T)),
		cex.axis = 0.9,las = 1,col = "grey55")

for(i in 1:22){
	#whiskers
	#95%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_q[i,5],i+0.15,N_vichy_q[i,5])
	segments(i,N_vichy_q[i,4],i,N_vichy_q[i,5])
	#5%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_q[i,1],i+0.15,N_vichy_q[i,1])
	segments(i,N_vichy_q[i,2],i,N_vichy_q[i,1])
	#boxplot
	polygon(c(i-0.3,i+0.3,i+0.3,i-0.3),c(N_vichy_q[i,2],N_vichy_q[i,2],N_vichy_q[i,4],N_vichy_q[i,4]),col="green")
	#mean
	segments(i-0.3,mean_res[i,],i+0.3,mean_res[i,])
}

points(x=seq(23,29,1),N[23:29,1],pch=16)


for(i in 30:30){
	#whiskers
	#95%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_q[i-7,5],i+0.15,N_vichy_q[i-7,5])
	segments(i,N_vichy_q[i-7,4],i,N_vichy_q[i-7,5])
	#5%
	segments(i-0.15,N_vichy_q[i-7,1],i+0.15,N_vichy_q[i-7,1])
	segments(i,N_vichy_q[i-7,2],i,N_vichy_q[i-7,1])
	#boxplot
	polygon(c(i-0.3,i+0.3,i+0.3,i-0.3),c(N_vichy_q[i-7,2],N_vichy_q[i-7,2],N_vichy_q[i-7,4],N_vichy_q[i-7,4]),col="green")
	#mean
	segments(i-0.3,mean_res[i-7,],i+0.3,mean_res[i-7,])
}

points(x=seq(31,T,1),N[31:T,1],pch=16)

segments(x0=0,y0=mean(mean_res),y1=mean(mean_res),x1=(T+0.5),col="red")
mtext(round(mean(mean_res),5),side=4,line=0,at=mean(mean_res),cex = 0.8,col="red",las=1)

```

## Géniteurs potentiels et ratio

```{r}
#| label: S_calc
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false

#----- recalcul issus de R -----------#
S_vichy_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
S_alagnon_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
S_langeac_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
S_poutes_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))

ratio_S_V_r=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_S_A_r=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_S_L_r=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_S_P_r=array(NA,c(iteration,T))

for (t in 1:T){
	for(i in 1:iteration){
		ratio_S_V_r[i,t] = S_vichy[i,t] / (S_vichy[i,t] + S_alagnon[i,t] + S_langeac[i,t] + S_poutes[i,t])
		ratio_S_A_r[i,t] = S_alagnon[i,t] / (S_vichy[i,t] + S_alagnon[i,t] + S_langeac[i,t] + S_poutes[i,t])
		ratio_S_L_r[i,t] = S_langeac[i,t] / (S_vichy[i,t] + S_alagnon[i,t] + S_langeac[i,t] + S_poutes[i,t])
		if (t>=12) {
		ratio_S_P_r[i,t] = S_poutes[i,t] / (S_vichy[i,t] + S_alagnon[i,t] + S_langeac[i,t] + S_poutes[i,t])}
	}
}

ratio_S_V_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_S_A_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_S_L_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_S_P_q_r=array(NA,c(T,5))


for (t in 1:T){
	ratio_S_V_q_r[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_V_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_S_A_q_r[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_A_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_S_L_q_r[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_L_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	if (t>=12) {
	ratio_S_P_q_r[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_P_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)}
}

#vérif des sommes des quantiles
verif_S_q_r=array(0,dim=c(T,5))
for (t in 1:T){
  for(q in 1:5)
	verif_S_q_r[t,q]<-sum(ratio_S_V_q_r[t,q]+ratio_S_A_q_r[t,q],ratio_S_L_q_r[t,q],ratio_S_P_q_r[t,q],na.rm=TRUE)
}
	

  for (i in 1:T){
  	S_vichy_q_r[i,]=quantile(S_vichy[,i],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
  	S_alagnon_q_r[i,]=quantile(S_alagnon[,i],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
  	S_langeac_q_r[i,]=quantile(S_langeac[,i],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
  if (i >= 12) {
    S_poutes_q_r[i,] <- quantile(S_poutes[, i], probs = c(0.025, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.975), names = FALSE, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    S_poutes_q_r[i,] <- rep(NA, 5)
  }
  }

#----- Calculs issus d'Openbugs -------#

S_vichy_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"S_vichyCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"S_vichyCODAindex.txt"))
S_alagnon_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"S_alagnonCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"S_alagnonCODAindex.txt"))
S_langeac_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"S_langeacCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"S_langeacCODAindex.txt"))
#manque S_poutes dans les codas on le recalcul à partir de N_poutes
N_poutes_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"N_poutesCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"N_poutesCODAindex.txt"))
S_poutes_bugs = array(NA,dim=c(iteration, T))
for (t in 12:T){ #à partir de t=45 (2019) on estime les passages à Poutès (avant=comptage)
  for (i in 1:iteration){
    if(t<45){
      S_poutes_bugs[i,t] <- max(N[t,4],1)
    }
    if(t>=45){
       S_poutes_bugs[i,t] <- max(N_poutes_bugs[i,t],1)
    }
    
  }
}

S_vichy_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
S_alagnon_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
S_langeac_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
S_poutes_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))

ratio_S_V_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_S_A_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_S_L_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_S_P_bugs=array(NA,c(iteration,T))

for (t in 1:T){
	for(i in 1:iteration){
		ratio_S_V_bugs[i,t] = S_vichy_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_bugs[i,t] + ifelse(is.na(S_poutes_bugs[i,t]),0,S_poutes_bugs[i,t]))
		ratio_S_A_bugs[i,t] = S_alagnon_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_bugs[i,t] + ifelse(is.na(S_poutes_bugs[i,t]),0,S_poutes_bugs[i,t]))
		ratio_S_L_bugs[i,t] = S_langeac_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_bugs[i,t] + ifelse(is.na(S_poutes_bugs[i,t]),0,S_poutes_bugs[i,t]))
		if (t>=12) {
		ratio_S_P_bugs[i,t] = S_poutes_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_bugs[i,t] + S_poutes_bugs[i,t])}
	}
}

ratio_S_V_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_S_A_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_S_L_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_S_P_q_bugs=array(NA,c(T,5))


for (t in 1:T){
	ratio_S_V_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_V_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_S_A_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_A_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_S_L_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_L_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	if (t>=12) {
	ratio_S_P_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_P_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)}
}

#vérif des sommes des quantiles
verif_S_q_bugs=array(0,dim=c(T,5))
for (t in 1:T){
  for(q in 1:5)
	verif_S_q_bugs[t,q]<-sum(ratio_S_V_q_bugs[t,q]+ratio_S_A_q_bugs[t,q],ratio_S_L_q_bugs[t,q],ratio_S_P_q_bugs[t,q],na.rm=TRUE)
}
	

  for (i in 1:T){
  	S_vichy_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(S_vichy_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
  	S_alagnon_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(S_alagnon_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
  	S_langeac_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(S_langeac_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
  if (i >= 12) {
    S_poutes_q_bugs[i,] <- quantile(S_poutes_bugs[,i], probs = c(0.025, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.975), names = FALSE, na.rm = TRUE)
  } else {
    S_poutes_q_bugs[i,] <- rep(NA, 5)
  }
  }


```

```{r}
#| label: S_graph
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| fig.width: 8
#| fig.height: 9
#| fig.cap: "Géniteurs en effectif et ratio issus des recalculs dans R"


par(mfrow=c(4,2),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4,col.lab="grey25",col.axis="grey55",col.main="grey25")

custom_plot(data = S_vichy_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(S["t,1"])),
                    ylim_range = c(0, smart_round(max(S_vichy_q_r[,4]),dir="low")),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("a.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_V_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteurs")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("b.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.5, y1 = 0.5, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.2, y1 = 0.2, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = S_alagnon_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(S["t,2"])),
                    ylim_range = c(0, smart_round(max(S_alagnon_q_r[,5]),dir="up")),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("c.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_A_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteurs")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("d.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.5, y1 = 0.5, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.2, y1 = 0.2, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = S_langeac_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Langeac-Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(S["t,3"])),
                    ylim_range = c(0, smart_round(max(S_langeac_q_r[,3]),dir="up")),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("e.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_L_q_r,
                    years = 1:T,
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Langeac-Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteurs")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("f.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.5, y1 = 0.5, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.2, y1 = 0.2, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = S_poutes_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(S["t,4"])),
                    ylim_range = c(0, smart_round(max(S_langeac_q_r[,3]),dir="up")), #on met sur la même échelle que Langeac
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("g.")),
                    add_segments = list(list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = smart_round(max(S_langeac_q_r[,3]),dir="up"), lty = 2)),
                    add_text = list(list(x = 5.5, y = 250, labels = "Amont Poutès\n inaccessible", cex = 1, pos = 3)),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_P_q_r,
                    years = 1:T,
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteurs")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("h.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.5, y1 = 0.5, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.2, y1 = 0.2, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    add_text = list(list(x = 5.5, y = 0.35, labels = "Amont Poutès\n inaccessible", cex = 1, pos = 3)),
                    lang="fr")


```


```{r}
#| label: S_graph_bugs
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| fig.width: 8
#| fig.height: 9
#| fig.cap: "Géniteurs en effectif et ratio issus des codas d'Openbugs"


par(mfrow=c(4,2),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4,col.lab="grey25",col.axis="grey55",col.main="grey25")

custom_plot(data = S_vichy_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(S["t,1"])),
                    ylim_range = c(0, smart_round(max(S_vichy_q_bugs[,4]),dir="low")),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("a.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_V_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteurs")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("b.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.5, y1 = 0.5, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.2, y1 = 0.2, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = S_alagnon_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(S["t,2"])),
                    ylim_range = c(0, smart_round(max(S_alagnon_q_bugs[,5]),dir="up")),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("c.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_A_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteurs")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("d.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.5, y1 = 0.5, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.2, y1 = 0.2, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = S_langeac_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T,
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Langeac-Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(S["t,3"])),
                    ylim_range = c(0, smart_round(max(S_langeac_q_bugs[,3]),dir="up")),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("e.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_L_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Langeac-Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteurs")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("f.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.5, y1 = 0.5, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.2, y1 = 0.2, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = S_poutes_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T,
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    yr_point = 12:45,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(S["t,4"])),
                    ylim_range = c(0, smart_round(max(S_poutes_q_bugs[,3],na.rm=TRUE),dir="up")), #on met sur la même échelle que Langeac
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("g.")),
                    add_segments = list(list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = smart_round(max(S_poutes_q_bugs[,3],na.rm=TRUE),dir="up"), lty = 2)),
                    add_text = list(list(x = 5.5, y = 100, labels = "Amont Poutès\n inaccessible", cex = 1, pos = 3)),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_P_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    yr_point = c(23:29,31:45),
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteurs")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("h.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.5, y1 = 0.5, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 0, x1 = T, y0 = 0.2, y1 = 0.2, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    add_text = list(list(x = 5.5, y = 0.35, labels = "Amont Poutès\n inaccessible", cex = 1, pos = 3)),
                    lang="fr")
```

## Juvéniles 0+ et ratio juvéniles et géniteurs
```{r}
#| label: Juv_calc
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false


ratio_juv_tot_V_r=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_juv_tot_A_r=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_juv_tot_L_r=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_juv_tot_P_r=array(0,c(iteration,T))

for (t in 7:T){			
	for(i in 1:iteration){
		ratio_juv_tot_V_r[i,t] = juv_tot_vichy[i,t] / (juv_tot_vichy[i,t] +  juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] + juv_tot_langeac[i,t] + juv_tot_poutes[i,t])
		ratio_juv_tot_A_r[i,t] = juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] / (juv_tot_vichy[i,t] +  juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] + juv_tot_langeac[i,t] + juv_tot_poutes[i,t])
		ratio_juv_tot_L_r[i,t] = juv_tot_langeac[i,t] / (juv_tot_vichy[i,t] +  juv_tot_alagnon[i,t] + juv_tot_langeac[i,t] + juv_tot_poutes[i,t])
		ratio_juv_tot_P_r[i,t] = 1 - ratio_juv_tot_V_r[i,t] - ratio_juv_tot_A_r[i,t] - ratio_juv_tot_L_r[i,t]
	}
}

ratio_juv_tot_V_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_juv_tot_A_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_juv_tot_L_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_juv_tot_P_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))

for (t in 7:T){
	
	ratio_juv_tot_V_q_r[t,]=quantile(ratio_juv_tot_V_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_juv_tot_A_q_r[t,]=quantile(ratio_juv_tot_A_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_juv_tot_L_q_r[t,]=quantile(ratio_juv_tot_L_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_juv_tot_P_q_r[t,]=quantile(ratio_juv_tot_P_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
}

#calcul de la disponibilité relative de l'habitat potentiel pour les juvéniles
dispo_hab_V_1_12 <- S_juv_JP[1,1]/(S_juv_JP[1,1]+S_juv_JP[2,1]+S_juv_JP[3,1])
dispo_hab_V_12_24 <- S_juv_JP[1,12]/(S_juv_JP[1,12]+S_juv_JP[2,12]+S_juv_JP[3,12]+S_juv_JP[4,12])
dispo_hab_V_24_30 <- S_juv_JP[1,24]/(S_juv_JP[1,24]+S_juv_JP[2,24]+S_juv_JP[3,24]+S_juv_JP[4,24])	
dispo_hab_V_30_T <- S_juv_JP[1,30]/(S_juv_JP[1,30]+S_juv_JP[2,30]+S_juv_JP[3,30]+S_juv_JP[4,30])			

dispo_hab_A_1_12 <- S_juv_JP[2,1]/(S_juv_JP[1,1]+S_juv_JP[2,1]+S_juv_JP[3,1])
dispo_hab_A_12_24 <- S_juv_JP[2,12]/(S_juv_JP[1,12]+S_juv_JP[2,12]+S_juv_JP[3,12]+S_juv_JP[4,12])
dispo_hab_A_24_30 <- S_juv_JP[2,24]/(S_juv_JP[1,24]+S_juv_JP[2,24]+S_juv_JP[3,24]+S_juv_JP[4,24])	
dispo_hab_A_30_T <- S_juv_JP[2,30]/(S_juv_JP[1,30]+S_juv_JP[2,30]+S_juv_JP[3,30]+S_juv_JP[4,30])		

dispo_hab_L_1_12 <- S_juv_JP[3,1]/(S_juv_JP[1,1]+S_juv_JP[2,1]+S_juv_JP[3,1])
dispo_hab_L_12_24 <- S_juv_JP[3,12]/(S_juv_JP[1,12]+S_juv_JP[2,12]+S_juv_JP[3,12]+S_juv_JP[4,12])
dispo_hab_L_24_30 <- S_juv_JP[3,24]/(S_juv_JP[1,24]+S_juv_JP[2,24]+S_juv_JP[3,24]+S_juv_JP[4,24])	
dispo_hab_L_30_T <- S_juv_JP[3,30]/(S_juv_JP[1,30]+S_juv_JP[2,30]+S_juv_JP[3,30]+S_juv_JP[4,30])		

dispo_hab_P_12_24 <- S_juv_JP[4,12]/(S_juv_JP[1,12]+S_juv_JP[2,12]+S_juv_JP[3,12]+S_juv_JP[4,12])
dispo_hab_P_24_30 <- S_juv_JP[4,24]/(S_juv_JP[1,24]+S_juv_JP[2,24]+S_juv_JP[3,24]+S_juv_JP[4,24])	
dispo_hab_P_30_T <- S_juv_JP[4,30]/(S_juv_JP[1,30]+S_juv_JP[2,30]+S_juv_JP[3,30]+S_juv_JP[4,30])		

# Diff ratio géniteurs/juvéniles
diff_ratio_V_r=ratio_S_V_r-ratio_juv_tot_V_r
diff_ratio_A_r=ratio_S_A_r-ratio_juv_tot_A_r
diff_ratio_L_r=ratio_S_L_r-ratio_juv_tot_L_r
diff_ratio_P_r=ratio_S_P_r-ratio_juv_tot_P_r

diff_ratio_V_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))
diff_ratio_A_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))
diff_ratio_L_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))
diff_ratio_P_q_r=array(0,c(T,5))

for (t in 1:T){
	diff_ratio_V_q_r[t,]=quantile(diff_ratio_V_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	diff_ratio_A_q_r[t,]=quantile(diff_ratio_A_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	diff_ratio_L_q_r[t,]=quantile(diff_ratio_L_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	if (t>=12) {
	diff_ratio_P_q_r[t,]=quantile(diff_ratio_P_r[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	}
}

# Calcul avec les données issues d'Openbugs
S_vichy_real_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"S_vichyCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"S_vichyCODAindex.txt"))
S_alagnon_real_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"S_alagnonCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"S_alagnonCODAindex.txt"))
S_langeac_real_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"S_langeacCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"S_langeacCODAindex.txt"))
S_poutes_real_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"N_poutesCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"N_poutesCODAindex.txt"))
S_poutes_counter_bugs<-N[,4]

ratio_S_V_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_S_A_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_S_L_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_S_P_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))

for (t in 1:12){
	for(i in 1:iteration){
		ratio_S_V_bugs[i,t] = S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] +  S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t])
		ratio_S_A_bugs[i,t] = S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t])
		ratio_S_L_bugs[i,t] = S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t])
	}
}

for (t in 13:44){
	
	for( i in 1:iteration){
	  ratio_S_V_bugs[i,t] = S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] +  S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] + S_poutes_counter_bugs[t])
		ratio_S_A_bugs[i,t] = S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] + S_poutes_counter_bugs[t])
		ratio_S_L_bugs[i,t] = S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] + S_poutes_counter_bugs[t])
		ratio_S_P_bugs[i,t] = S_poutes_counter_bugs[t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] + S_poutes_counter_bugs[t])
	}
}

for (t in 45:T){
	for( i in 1:iteration){
	  ratio_S_V_bugs[i,t] = S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] +  S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] + S_poutes_real_bugs[i,t])
		ratio_S_A_bugs[i,t] = S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] + S_poutes_real_bugs[i,t])
		ratio_S_L_bugs[i,t] = S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] + S_poutes_real_bugs[i,t])
		ratio_S_P_bugs[i,t] = S_poutes_real_bugs[i,t] / (S_vichy_real_bugs[i,t] + S_alagnon_real_bugs[i,t] + S_langeac_real_bugs[i,t] + S_poutes_real_bugs[i,t])
	}
}

ratio_S_V_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_S_A_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_S_L_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_S_P_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))

for (t in 1:T){
	
	ratio_S_V_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_V_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_S_A_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_A_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_S_L_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_L_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_S_P_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_S_P_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	}

# Ratio Juvénile
juv_tot_V_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/juv_tot_VCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/juv_tot_VCODAindex.txt"))
juv_tot_A_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/juv_tot_ACODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/juv_tot_ACODAindex.txt"))
juv_tot_L_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/juv_tot_LCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/juv_tot_LCODAindex.txt"))
juv_tot_P_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"simulation/juv_tot_PCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"simulation/juv_tot_PCODAindex.txt"))

ratio_juv_tot_V_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_juv_tot_A_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_juv_tot_L_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))
ratio_juv_tot_P_bugs=array(0,c(iteration,T))

for (t in 7:15){			
	for(i in 1:iteration){
		ratio_juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] = juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] / (juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t])
		ratio_juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] = juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] / (juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t])
		ratio_juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t] = juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t] / (juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t])
	}
}
for (t in 16:T){
	for(i in 1:iteration){
	  	ratio_juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] = juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] / (juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_P_bugs[i,t])
		ratio_juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] = juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] / (juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_P_bugs[i,t])
		ratio_juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t] = juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t] / (juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t] + juv_tot_P_bugs[i,t])
		ratio_juv_tot_P_bugs[i,t] = 1 - ratio_juv_tot_V_bugs[i,t] - ratio_juv_tot_A_bugs[i,t] - ratio_juv_tot_L_bugs[i,t]
	}
}

ratio_juv_tot_V_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_juv_tot_A_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_juv_tot_L_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
ratio_juv_tot_P_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))


for (t in 7:T){
	
	ratio_juv_tot_V_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_juv_tot_V_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_juv_tot_A_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_juv_tot_A_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	ratio_juv_tot_L_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_juv_tot_L_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
}

for (t in 16:T){
	ratio_juv_tot_P_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(ratio_juv_tot_P_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
}


# Diff ratio géniteurs/juvéniles
diff_ratio_V_bugs=ratio_S_V_bugs-ratio_juv_tot_V_bugs
diff_ratio_A_bugs=ratio_S_A_bugs-ratio_juv_tot_A_bugs
diff_ratio_L_bugs=ratio_S_L_bugs-ratio_juv_tot_L_bugs
diff_ratio_P_bugs=ratio_S_P_bugs-ratio_juv_tot_P_bugs

diff_ratio_V_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
diff_ratio_A_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
diff_ratio_L_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))
diff_ratio_P_q_bugs=array(0,c(T,5))

for (t in 1:T){
	diff_ratio_V_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(diff_ratio_V_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)

	diff_ratio_A_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(diff_ratio_A_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	diff_ratio_L_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(diff_ratio_L_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
	diff_ratio_P_q_bugs[t,]=quantile(diff_ratio_P_bugs[,t],probs=c(0.025,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.975),names=FALSE)
}

```


```{r}
#| label: Juv_graph
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| fig.width: 8
#| fig.height: 9
#| fig.cap: "Ratio Juvéniles et Géniteurs issus des recalculs dans R"

par(mfrow=c(4,3),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4,col.lab="grey25",col.axis="grey55",col.main="grey25")
# Vichy
  # Prod juveniles
custom_plot(data = ratio_juv_tot_V_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio juvénile prod")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("a.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_V_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_V_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_V_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_V_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_V_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_V_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_V_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_V_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # Géniteurs
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_V_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteur")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("b.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_V_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_V_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_V_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_V_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_V_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_V_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_V_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_V_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # diff ratio
custom_plot(data = diff_ratio_V_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("Diff. ratio S - ratio Juv")),
                    ylim_range = c(-0.7,0.7),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("c.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = T, y0 = 0, y1 = 0, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

# Alagnon
  # Prod juveniles
custom_plot(data = ratio_juv_tot_A_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio juvénile prod")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("d.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_A_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_A_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_A_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_A_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_A_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_A_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_A_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_A_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # Géniteurs
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_A_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteur")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("e.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_A_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_A_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_A_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_A_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_A_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_A_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_A_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_A_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # diff ratio
custom_plot(data = diff_ratio_A_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("Diff. ratio S - ratio Juv")),
                    ylim_range = c(-0.7,0.7),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("f.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = T, y0 = 0, y1 = 0, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

# Langeac
  # Prod juveniles
custom_plot(data = ratio_juv_tot_L_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Langeac_Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio juvénile prod")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("g.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_L_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_L_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_L_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_L_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_L_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_L_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_L_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_L_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # Géniteurs
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_L_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Langeac_Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteur")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("h.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_L_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_L_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_L_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_L_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_L_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_L_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_L_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_L_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # diff ratio
custom_plot(data = diff_ratio_L_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Langeac_Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("Diff. ratio S - ratio Juv")),
                    ylim_range = c(-0.7,0.7),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("i.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = T, y0 = 0, y1 = 0, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")		

# Poutès
  # Prod juveniles
custom_plot(data = ratio_juv_tot_P_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 16,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio juvénile prod")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("j.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_P_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_P_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_P_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_P_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_P_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_P_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # Géniteurs
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_P_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteur")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("k.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_P_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_P_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_P_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_P_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_P_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_P_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # diff ratio
custom_plot(data = diff_ratio_P_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 16,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("Diff. ratio S - ratio Juv")),
                    ylim_range = c(-0.7,0.7),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("l.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = T, y0 = 0, y1 = 0, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")	

```


```{r}
#| label: Juv_graph_bugs
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| fig.width: 8
#| fig.height: 9
#| fig.cap: "Ratio Juvéniles et Géniteurs issus des codas d'Openbugs"

par(mfrow=c(4,3),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4,col.lab="grey25",col.axis="grey55",col.main="grey25")
# Vichy
  # Prod juveniles
custom_plot(data = ratio_juv_tot_V_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio juvénile prod")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("a.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_V_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_V_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_V_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_V_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_V_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_V_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_V_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_V_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # Géniteurs
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_V_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteur")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("b.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_V_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_V_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_V_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_V_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_V_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_V_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_V_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_V_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # diff ratio
custom_plot(data = diff_ratio_V_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("Diff. ratio S - ratio Juv")),
                    ylim_range = c(-0.7,0.7),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("c.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = T, y0 = 0, y1 = 0, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

# Alagnon
  # Prod juveniles
custom_plot(data = ratio_juv_tot_A_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio juvénile prod")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("d.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_A_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_A_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_A_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_A_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_A_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_A_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_A_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_A_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # Géniteurs
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_A_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteur")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("e.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_A_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_A_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_A_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_A_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_A_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_A_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_A_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_A_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # diff ratio
custom_plot(data = diff_ratio_A_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("Diff. ratio S - ratio Juv")),
                    ylim_range = c(-0.7,0.7),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("f.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = T, y0 = 0, y1 = 0, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

# Langeac
  # Prod juveniles
custom_plot(data = ratio_juv_tot_L_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Langeac_Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio juvénile prod")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("g.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_L_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_L_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_L_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_L_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_L_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_L_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_L_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_L_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # Géniteurs
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_L_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Langeac_Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteur")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("h.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = 12, y0 = dispo_hab_L_1_12, y1 = dispo_hab_L_1_12, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_L_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_L_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_L_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_L_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_L_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_L_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # diff ratio
custom_plot(data = diff_ratio_L_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 7,
                    main_title = "Langeac_Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("Diff. ratio S - ratio Juv")),
                    ylim_range = c(-0.7,0.7),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("i.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = T, y0 = 0, y1 = 0, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")		

# Poutès
  # Prod juveniles
custom_plot(data = ratio_juv_tot_P_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 16,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio juvénile prod")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("j.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_P_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_P_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_P_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_P_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_P_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_P_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # Géniteurs
custom_plot(data = ratio_S_P_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 3,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("ratio géniteur")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("k.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 24, y0 = dispo_hab_P_12_24, y1 = dispo_hab_P_12_24, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 24, x1 = 30, y0 = dispo_hab_P_24_30, y1 = dispo_hab_P_24_30, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 30, x1 = T, y0 = dispo_hab_P_30_T, y1 = dispo_hab_P_30_T, col = "deepskyblue", lty = 2),
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

  # diff ratio
custom_plot(data = diff_ratio_P_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 16,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic("Diff. ratio S - ratio Juv")),
                    ylim_range = c(-0.7,0.7),
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("l.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 1, x1 = T, y0 = 0, y1 = 0, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")	
                    lang="fr")
```


## Densité de juvéniles

```{r}
#| label: dens_calc
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false

dmoy_tot_V_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_tot_A_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_tot_L_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_tot_P_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))

dmoy_wild_V_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_wild_A_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_wild_L_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_wild_P_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))


dmoy_juv_V_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_juv_A_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_juv_L_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_juv_P_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))

dmoy_egg_V_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_egg_L_q_r=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))


for (i in 1:T){
	dmoy_tot_V_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_moy_vichy[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_tot_A_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_moy_alagnon[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_tot_L_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_moy_langeac[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	if(i>12){
	  dmoy_tot_P_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_moy_poutes[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	}
		
	dmoy_wild_V_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_wild_moy_vichy[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_wild_A_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_wild_moy_alagnon[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_wild_L_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_wild_moy_langeac[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	if(i>12){
	  dmoy_wild_P_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_wild_moy_poutes[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	}
		
	dmoy_juv_V_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_juv_moy_vichy[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_juv_A_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_juv_moy_alagnon[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_juv_L_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_juv_moy_langeac[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
  if(i>12){
	  dmoy_juv_P_q_r[i,]=quantile(d_juv_moy_poutes[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	}
}

# 
# for (i in 21:(Told-1)){
# 	dmoy_egg_V_q_un[i,]=quantile(stocking_egg_V_un[,i-11],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
# }
# 
# for (i in 21:(Tnew-1)){
# 	dmoy_egg_V_q_deux[i,]=quantile(stocking_egg_V_deux[,i-11],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
# }
# 
# for (i in 23:33){
# 	dmoy_egg_L_q_un[i,]=quantile(stocking_egg_L_un[,i-11],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
# 	dmoy_egg_L_q_deux[i,]=quantile(stocking_egg_L_deux[,i-11],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
# 	#dmoy_egg_L_q_trois[i,]=quantile(stocking_egg_L_trois[,i-11],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
# }

# Calcul issus d'Openbugs

dmoy_tot_V_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_VCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_VCODAindex.txt"))
dmoy_tot_A_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_ACODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_ACODAindex.txt"))
dmoy_tot_L_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_LCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_LCODAindex.txt"))
dmoy_tot_P_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_PCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoytot_PCODAindex.txt"))

dmoy_wild_V_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoywild_VCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoywild_VCODAindex.txt"))
dmoy_wild_A_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoywild_ACODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoywild_ACODAindex.txt"))
dmoy_wild_L_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoywild_LCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoywild_LCODAindex.txt"))
dmoy_wild_P_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"dmoywild_PCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"dmoywild_PCODAindex.txt"))

stocking_juv_V_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"stocking_juv_VCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"stocking_juv_VCODAindex.txt"))
stocking_juv_A_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"stocking_juv_ACODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"stocking_juv_ACODAindex.txt"))
stocking_juv_L_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"stocking_juv_LCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"stocking_juv_LCODAindex.txt"))
stocking_juv_P_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"stocking_juv_PCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"stocking_juv_PCODAindex.txt"))

stocking_egg_V_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"stocking_egg_VCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"stocking_egg_VCODAindex.txt"))
stocking_egg_L_bugs=load_reindex_coda(str_c(datawd,"stocking_egg_LCODAchain1.txt"),str_c(datawd,"stocking_egg_LCODAindex.txt"))


dmoy_tot_V_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_tot_A_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_tot_L_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_tot_P_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))

dmoy_wild_V_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_wild_A_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_wild_L_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_wild_P_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))

dmoy_juv_V_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_juv_A_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_juv_L_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_juv_P_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))

dmoy_egg_V_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))
dmoy_egg_L_q_bugs=array(rep(0,T*5),dim=c(T,5))


for (i in 2:T){
	dmoy_tot_V_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(dmoy_tot_V_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_tot_A_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(dmoy_tot_A_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_tot_L_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(dmoy_tot_L_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	if(i>12){
	  dmoy_tot_P_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(dmoy_tot_P_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	}
		
	dmoy_wild_V_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(dmoy_wild_V_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_wild_A_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(dmoy_wild_A_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_wild_L_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(dmoy_wild_L_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	if(i>12){
	  dmoy_wild_P_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(dmoy_wild_P_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	}
		
	dmoy_juv_V_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(stocking_juv_V_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_juv_A_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(stocking_juv_A_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	dmoy_juv_L_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(stocking_juv_L_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
  if(i>12){
	  dmoy_juv_P_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(stocking_juv_P_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
	}
}

for (i in 22:T){
	dmoy_egg_V_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(stocking_egg_V_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
}

for (i in 23:33){
	dmoy_egg_L_q_bugs[i,]=quantile(stocking_egg_L_bugs[,i],probs=c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95),names=FALSE)
}

I_juv_V=I_juv_moy[,1]
I_juv_A=I_juv_moy[,2]
I_juv_L=I_juv_moy[,3]
I_juv_P=I_juv_moy[,4]
```


```{r}
#| label: dens_graph
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| fig.width: 8
#| fig.height: 9
#| fig.cap: "Densités de juvéniles issus des recalculs dans R"

par(mfrow=c(4,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4,col.lab="grey25",col.axis="grey55",col.main="grey25")

custom_plot(data = dmoy_tot_V_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 2,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(D^tot*" (0+."*m^-2*")")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    color_dev = I_juv_V,
                    sector_color = 1,
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("a.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = dmoy_tot_A_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 2,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(D^tot*" (0+."*m^-2*")")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    color_dev = I_juv_A,
                    sector_color = 2,
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("b.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = dmoy_tot_L_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 2,
                    main_title = "Langeac-Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(D^tot*" (0+."*m^-2*")")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    color_dev = I_juv_L,
                    sector_color = 2,
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("c.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = dmoy_tot_P_q_r,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 13,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(D^tot*" (0+."*m^-2*")")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    color_dev = I_juv_P,
                    sector_color = 2,
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("d.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

```


```{r}
#| label: dens_graph_bugs
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| fig.width: 8
#| fig.height: 9
#| fig.cap: "Densités de juvéniles issus des codas d'Openbugs"

par(mfrow=c(4,1),mar=c(4,6.1,2,0.5),cex.lab=1.4, cex.lab=1.4,col.lab="grey25",col.axis="grey55",col.main="grey25")

custom_plot(data = dmoy_tot_V_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 2,
                    main_title = "Vichy-Langeac",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(D^tot*" (0+."*m^-2*")")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    color_dev = I_juv_V,
                    sector_color = 1,
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("a.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = dmoy_tot_A_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 2,
                    main_title = "Alagnon",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(D^tot*" (0+."*m^-2*")")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    color_dev = I_juv_A,
                    sector_color = 2,
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("b.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = dmoy_tot_L_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 2,
                    main_title = "Langeac-Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(D^tot*" (0+."*m^-2*")")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    color_dev = I_juv_L,
                    sector_color = 2,
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("c.")),
                    lang="fr")
custom_plot(data = dmoy_tot_P_q_bugs,
                    years = 1:T, 
                    yr_deb = 13,
                    main_title = "Amont Poutès",
                    ylab_txt = expression(italic(D^tot*" (0+."*m^-2*")")),
                    ylim_range = c(0, 1),
                    color_dev = I_juv_P,
                    sector_color = 2,
                    subplot_label = expression(italic("d.")),
                    add_segments = list(
                      list(x0 = 12, x1 = 12, y0 = 0, y1 = 1, lty = 2)),
                    lang="fr")

```
